testcase.name: test_friend_requests_endpoint_for_badge_count
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29_bug_fixes.py:302: in test_friend_requests_endpoint_for_badge_count assert response.status_code == 200, f"Friend requests fetch failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Friend requests fetch failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_conversations_endpoint_for_message_badge

failure.message: AssertionError: Conversations should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'conversations': [{'last_message': {'content': 'TEST_Message from iteration 27 test', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:04:58.633251+00:00', 'id': '5988ad0a-dde4-429f-a8ce-cd2023bff97e', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'cashback_balance': 0, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.436Z', 'email': 'spa.luxury@titelli.com', ...}, 'unread_count': 0}, {'last_message': {'content': 'Test message to self', 'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:49:38.354073+00:00', 'id': 'd304662b-5c6b-4395-9052-3bf89d7c7965', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'activity_posts_count': 2, 'cashback_balance': 100.82000000000001, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'cover_image': 'https://example.com/persist-test-a0621d18.jpg', ...}, 'unread_count': 1}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration29_bug_fixes.py:324: in test_conversations_endpoint_for_message_badge assert isinstance(data, list), "Conversations should be a list" E AssertionError: Conversations should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'conversations': [{'last_message': {'content': 'TEST_Message from iteration 27 test', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:04:58.633251+00:00', 'id': '5988ad0a-dde4-429f-a8ce-cd2023bff97e', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'cashback_balance': 0, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'created_at': '2026-01-21T22:57:48.436Z', 'email': 'spa.luxury@titelli.com', ...}, 'unread_count': 0}, {'last_message': {'content': 'Test message to self', 'created_at': '2026-01-23T00:49:38.354073+00:00', 'id': 'd304662b-5c6b-4395-9052-3bf89d7c7965', 'is_read': False, ...}, 'partner': {'activity_posts_count': 2, 'cashback_balance': 100.82000000000001, 'city': 'Lausanne', 'cover_image': 'https://example.com/persist-test-a0621d18.jpg', ...}, 'unread_count': 1}]}, list)
